title: bromus hordeaceus var. neglectus
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. neglectus, also known as downy brome or downy cheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the genus Bromus and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus var. neglectus include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
